anchor.description: Determine if the tooltip should be placed on the pointer location or on the node.

classes.description: Override or extend the styles applied to the component.

position.description: Determines the tooltip position relatively to the anchor.

slotProps.description: The props used for each component slot.

sort.description: Defines the sort order in which series items are displayed in the axis tooltip. When set to none, series are displayed in the same order they are provided in the series property. Otherwise they are sorted by their value. Only applies when trigger='axis'.

axisValueCell.nodeName: the axisValueCell element. Only available for axis tooltip

slotDescriptions.root: The component that renders the root.
